response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling. While his direct GenAI production experience is limited, his technical leadership, cloud platform familiarity, and open-source contributions suggest adaptability. The career gap and lack of explicit RAG/vector DB experience are concerns but may be mitigated by his problem-solving track record.
strengths: Proven technical leadership as a Staff Engineer, including mentorship and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., at re:cinq and Altom Consulting).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, aligning with the role’s focus on agentic workflows.
Diverse cloud and full-stack expertise (AWS, Kubernetes, TypeScript/Python) with a focus on scalable, production-grade systems.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures or vector databases, which are core to the role.
Career gap (2025–present) may require clarification on recent skill currency, particularly in fast-evolving GenAI domains.
GenAI production experience is not clearly quantified; most AI work appears to be recent and tooling-focused rather than end-to-end solution delivery.
